text: When can a Virtual Warehouse start running queries?

options.b: Only during administrator defined time slots

text: True or False: Users are able to see the result sets of queries executed by other users that share their same role.

Which of the following languages can be used to implement Snowflake User Defined Functions (UDFs)? (Choose two.)
When should you consider disabling auto-suspend for a Virtual Warehouse? (Choose two.)

options.a: When users will be using compute at different times throughout a 24/7 period
options.c: When the compute must be available with no delay or lag time
options.d: When you do not want to have to manually turn on the Warehouse each time a user needs it

text: Which of the following are valid approaches to loading data into a Snowflake table? (Choose all that apply.)

options.a: Bulk copy from an External Stage
options.b: Continuous load using Snowpipe REST API
options.c: The Snowflake Web Interface (UI) data loading wizard
options.d: Bulk copy from an Internal Stage

text: If auto-suspend is enabled for a Virtual Warehouse, the Warehouse is automatically suspended when:

options.a: All Snowflakes sessions using the Warehouse are terminated.
options.b: The last query using the Warehouse completes.
options.c: There are no users logged into Snowflake.
options.d: The Warehouse is inactive for a specified period of time.

text: True or False: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) in Snowflake is only supported in conjunction with Single Sign-On (SSO).
The number of queries that a Virtual Warehouse can concurrently process is determined by (Choose two.):

options.b: The CONCURRENT_QUERY_LIMIT parameter set on the Snowflake account
options.c: The size of the data required for each query
options.d: The tool that is executing the query

text: Which of the following statements are true of VALIDATION_MODE in Snowflake? (Choose two.)

options.a: The VALIDATION_MODE option is used when creating an Internal Stage
options.b: VALIDATION_MODE=RETURN_ALL_ERRORS is a parameter of the COPY command
options.c: The VALIDATION_MODE option will validate data to be loaded by the COPY statement while completing the load and will return the rows that could not be loaded without error
options.d: The VALIDATION_MODE option will validate data to be loaded by the COPY statement without completing the load and will return possible errors

text: What privileges are required to create a task?

options.a: The GLOBAL privilege CREATE TASK is required to create a new task.
options.b: Tasks are created at the Application level and can only be created by the Account Admin role.
options.c: Many Snowflake DDLs are metadata operations only, and CREATE TASK DDL can be executed without virtual warehouse requirement or task specific grants.
options.d: The role must have access to the target schema and the CREATE TASK privilege on the schema itself.

True or False: You can query the files in an External Stage directly without having to load the data into a table.

True or False: Snowflake's Global Services Layer gathers and maintains statistics on all columns in all micro-partitions.

Which of the following statements is true of Snowflake?

options.a: It was built specifically for the cloud
options.b: It was built as an on-premises solution and then ported to the cloud
options.c: It was designed as a hybrid database to allow customers to store data either on premises or in the cloud
options.d: It was built for Hadoop architecture

text: What is the minimum Snowflake edition that provides multi-cluster warehouses and up to 90 days of Time Travel?
How many shares can be consumed by a single Data Consumer?

options.c: 100, but can be increased by contacting support

text: Which of the following statements are true about Schemas in Snowflake? (Choose two.)

options.a: A Schema may contain one or more Databases
options.b: A Database may contain one or more Schemas
options.c: A Schema is a logical grouping of Database Objects
options.d: Each Schema is contained within a Warehouse

text: True or False: You can resize a Virtual Warehouse while queries are running.

options.a: Micro-partitioning has been known to introduce data skew
options.b: Micro-partitioning: requires a partitioning schema to be defined up front
options.c: Micro-partitioning is transparently completed using the ordering that occurs when the data is inserted/loaded
options.d: Micro-partitioning can be disabled within a Snowflake account

Which of the following are options when creating a Virtual Warehouse? (Choose two.)
Which formats are supported for unloading data from Snowflake? (Choose two.)
True or False: Data Providers can share data with only the Data Consumer.
The fail-safe retention period is how many days?
True or False: Once created, a micro-partition will never be changed.
What services does Snowflake automatically provide for customers that they may have been responsible for with their on-premise system? (Choose all that apply.)
Which of the following statements would be used to export/unload data from Snowflake?
True or False: A 4X-Large Warehouse may, at times, take longer to provision than a X-Small Warehouse.
How would you determine the size of the virtual warehouse used for a task?

options.a: Root task may be executed concurrently (i.e. multiple instances), it is recommended to leave some margins in the execution window to avoid missing instances of execution
options.b: Querying (SELECT) the size of the stream content would help determine the warehouse size. For example, if querying large stream content, use a larger warehouse size
options.c: If using the stored procedure to execute multiple SQL statements, it's best to test run the stored procedure separately to size the compute resource first
options.d: Since task infrastructure is based on running the task body on schedule, it's recommended to configure the virtual warehouse for automatic concurrency handling using Multi-cluster warehouse (MCW) to match the task schedule

text: The Information Schema and Account Usage Share provide storage information for which of the following objects? (Choose three.)
What is the default File Format used in the COPY command if one is not specified?

True or False: It is possible for a user to run a query against the query result cache without requiring an active Warehouse.
True or False: When Snowflake is configured to use Single Sign-On (SSO), Snowflake receives the usernames and credentials from the SSO service and loads them into the customer's Snowflake account.
Which of the following are best practices for loading data into Snowflake? (Choose three.)

options.a: Aim to produce data files that are between 100 MB and 250 MB in size, compressed.
options.b: Load data from files in a cloud storage service in a different region or cloud platform from the service or region containing the Snowflake account, to save on cost.
options.c: Enclose fields that contain delimiter characters in single or double quotes.
options.d: Split large files into a greater number of smaller files to distribute the load among the compute resources in an active warehouse.
options.e: When planning which warehouse(s) to use for data loading, start with the largest warehouse possible.
options.f: Partition the staged data into large folders with random paths, allowing Snowflake to determine the best way to load each file.

text: Which Snowflake feature is used for both querying and restoring data?
What do the terms scale up and scale out refer to in Snowflake? (Choose two.)

options.a: Scaling out adds clusters of the same size to a virtual warehouse to handle more concurrent queries.
options.b: Scaling out adds clusters of varying sizes to a virtual warehouse.
options.c: Scaling out adds additional database servers to an existing running cluster to handle more concurrent queries.
options.d: Snowflake recommends using both scaling up and scaling out to handle more concurrent queries.
options.e: Scaling up resizes a virtual warehouse so it can handle more complex workloads.
options.f: Scaling up adds additional database servers to an existing running cluster to handle larger workloads.

text: What is the minimum Snowflake edition that has column-level security enabled?

options.b: Existing child objects within the database
options.c: Future child objects within the database
options.d: Privileges on the schemas within the database
options.e: Only schemas and tables within the database

text: Which of the following describes the Snowflake Cloud Services layer?

options.a: Coordinates activities in the Snowflake account
options.b: Executes queries submitted by the Snowflake account users

options.d: Manages the virtual warehouse cache to speed up queries

text: What is the maximum total Continuous Data Protection (CDP) charges incurred for a temporary table?
When reviewing a query profile, what is a symptom that a query is too large to fit into the memory?

options.a: A single join node uses more than 50% of the query time
options.b: Partitions scanned is equal to partitions total
options.c: An Aggregate Operator node is present
options.d: The query is spilling to remote storage

text: What type of query benefits the MOST from search optimization?

options.a: A query that uses only disjunction (i.e., OR) predicates
options.b: A query that includes analytical expressions
options.c: A query that uses equality predicates or predicates that use IN
options.d: A query that filters on semi-structured data types

options.a: Data can be filtered by an optional WHERE clause.
options.b: Incoming data can be joined with other tables.
options.e: Row level access can be defined.

text: Which of the following are characteristics of Snowflake virtual warehouses? (Choose two.)

options.a: Auto-resume applies only to the last warehouse that was started in a multi-cluster warehouse.
options.b: The ability to auto-suspend a warehouse is only available in the Enterprise edition or above.
options.c: SnowSQL supports both a configuration file and a command line option for specifying a default warehouse.
options.d: A user cannot specify a default warehouse when using the ODBC driver.
options.e: The default virtual warehouse size can be changed at any time.

options.a: Data is duplicated only if the original table is deleted.
